rag_rules: Each `annex agree` block is scoped to its owning component or implementation declaration.
Keep type-owned content and implementation-owned content in matching declarations; implementation-scoped annex text should remain after the structural elements it depends on.
generic_rules: Fuse generated annex text into the chosen owner without changing unrelated architecture, properties, subcomponents, or connections.
If the owner already has an AGREE annex, merge within that local annex scope instead of editing other declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Keep the entire annex block inside the surrounding component or implementation declaration.
anti_patterns: Do not move content across owners or between type and implementation scopes during fusion.
Do not rewrite structural AADL text just to accommodate an annex insertion.
irrelevant_topics: Detailed clause-generation forms such as assume, guarantee, eq, const, or assign syntax
